rulings.Case Title: RICKY CAMACHO VS. STEVEN MIYAKE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 13, 2017, line 1. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Deposition and Production of Documents. Granted in part and denied in part. Motion is granted as to the production of documents. The screenshots indicating the date of creation of the documents at issue shall be produced within 15 days of notice of entry of the order. Motion to compel deposition is moot. Request for sanctions is denied. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LINDA BREWSTER VS. DIPAK PATEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff Daniel Castilla To Appear For Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 13, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff Daniel Castilla To Appear For Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions. GRANTED. Plaintiff Daniel Castilla shall appear for deposition no later than June 30, 2017 on Defendant's notice. Sanctions granted in the amount of $2,151. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD PIPKINS ET AL VS. LARRY D. ODBERT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 13, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT STEVEN MATULICH'S MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Moot. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DONALD PIPKINS ET AL VS. LARRY D. ODBERT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, June 13, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT STEVEN MATULICH'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained: (1) demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action for violation of CC 2924b and f to allege tender. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges that Defendants failed to comply with notice requirements by failing to serve the required notice(s) on Plaintiff. Demurer to cause of action for violation of UCL is sustained with leave to amend to allege injury in fact; (2) demurrer to causes of action for fraudulent misrepresentation, elder abuse, declaratory and injunctive relief, and accounting are sustained without leave to amend. After multiple opportunities Plaintiff failed to allege facts to support these causes of action. Defendant to prepare order in conformity with the tentative ruling and present it for execution at the time of the hearing. Plaintiff to file Third Amended Complaint no later than by 4:00 p.m. on June 30, 2017. The Court notes that the Plaintiff routinely fails to comply with CCP and no such violations will be excused in the future. =(501/REQ)
